description.value: The creature's hold on reality is tenuous. Whenever it suffers damage from a force weapon, Holy weapon, or psychic power, it must make a Willpower test at the end of the round. On failure, it suffers 1d10 damage (ignoring armour and Toughness bonus) and, if reduced to 0 Wounds, is banished back to the Warp. Additionally, if the creature is in an area of null psychic energy or anathema, it must test Willpower each round or be banished.

system.benefit: When damaged by force, Holy, or psychic attacks, must pass Willpower test or suffer 1d10 additional damage (ignoring armour/TB). Banished at 0 Wounds. Must also test in null or anathema areas.
